vocab.example: For many high-flying executives, a luxury timepiece serves as a quintessential status symbol.
Owning a multi-million dollar watch is often cited as a prime example of conspicuous consumption.

vocab.meaning: tăng giá trị theo thời gian
vocab.example: Collectors often purchase limited editions because they are likely to appreciate in value over the years.

vocab.meaning: người đam mê nghệ thuật chế tác đồng hồ
vocab.example: A true horological enthusiast values the internal mechanism far more than the brand name.
Buying a rare Patek Philippe can be a shrewd investment that outperforms the stock market.

vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: Beyond the price tag, people are often drawn to the sheer aesthetic appeal of handcrafted dials.
Expensive accessories are frequently used to navigate the subtle nuances of social stratification.

vocab.meaning: sự phức tạp về cơ khí
vocab.example: The allure of luxury watches often lies in their mechanical complexity and hundreds of tiny moving parts.

vocab.meaning: xây dựng/phô diễn một hình ảnh
vocab.example: Individuals in the corporate world often wear premium watches to project an image of success and reliability.

vocab.meaning: dấu ấn của sự xuất sắc/thượng hạng
vocab.example: A Swiss-made label is widely regarded as a hallmark of excellence in the watchmaking industry.
